# 💫 About Me:
👋 Hi there! [cite_start]I'm a Senior Data Scientist & Software Engineer with 25+ years of experience designing and implementing high-impact solutions across enterprise systems, document management, and process automation. [cite: 3]
<br><br>
[cite_start]My current focus is on AI Agents, LLM orchestration, and intelligent automation. [cite: 4] [cite_start]I bring a unique blend of a strong foundation in .NET development combined with deep expertise in Python, NLP, and Generative AI. [cite: 4]
<br><br>
[cite_start]I'm passionate about rapidly prototyping, testing, and scaling AI systems that enhance decision-making, optimize workflows, and deliver measurable business impact. [cite: 5]
<br><br>
I am always keen to collaborate on innovative projects that harness data's potential. If you're looking for an experienced developer to join your team, I'm just a message away!
